proposition: The ix repo has adopted Demerzel governance integration with state/beliefs directory

supporting.claim: ix has governance/demerzel submodule, state/ directory scaffolded with 4 subdirs, CLAUDE.md governance snippet with markers, one compliance snapshot

contradicting.claim: Submodule is 134 commits behind master. CLAUDE.md snippet says Articles 1-7 (should be 1-11). state/beliefs/ is empty. No PDCA records. No knowledge transfers.
